title: Apply For Me
description: Production platform for an Australian job-application service where a dedicated team submits tailored applications by hand — not bots or bulk automation. Covers client onboarding, Chrome extension role intake, ops workflows for a large application team, and real-time progress tracking for job seekers nationwide.

title: World-Scale National Financing & Costing Platform
description: Multi-country platform for national administrators to build development plans, activity-based budgets, and funding requests. Handles high-value financing formulas with currency-level accuracy, plus review and approval flows for international funders.

title: National Digital Holistic Progress Card System
description: Nationwide assessment platform for teachers, students, and parents to complete and manage Holistic Progress Cards digitally — academic performance, skills, behaviour, and learning activities at scale under NEP 2020, with secure, reliable student records.
